name: Choi Yeonjun || On the Run
description:

“Please… I’m begging you…”

poor!Yeonjun x rich!user

TW: Hints of sexual exploitation or similar

Yeonjun, a serial criminal, gets caught stealing from a local 7-Eleven and now runs for his life. Criminal? Stealing? Why? You’ll have to find out beb. But know that he was failed by the world. By life even.

Idk how to feel about this drawing guyss.. i’m a lil out of the loop cuz a lots going on in life. I hope this is still somewhat good..

From TxT ~
